lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Hello, who are you?

lines.speaker: Veos
lines.text: I am Veos and I've just arrived in Port Sarim from the distant Kingdom of Great Kourend.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Where's that?

lines.speaker: Veos
lines.text: Across the sea, to the far west.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Tell me more about Great Kourend.

lines.speaker: Veos
lines.text: Great Kourend is a magnificent kingdom comprising of five cities. They are the cities of Arceuus, Lovakengj, Shayzien, Piscarilius and Hosidius. Each city is ruled by one of the five houses of Kourend.

lines.speaker: Veos
lines.text: At one time, the kingdom as a whole was ruled over by a king or queen that the five houses answered to.

lines.speaker: Veos
lines.text: However, since the last King died 20 years ago, the kingdom has instead been ruled by the Kourend Council.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: That's great, can you take me there please?

lines.speaker: Veos
lines.text: Certainly! I hope you don't get seasick, it is a long voyage.

lines.speaker: Veos
lines.text: Unfortunately it seems that you're not quite ready to visit Great Kourend yet. Come back when you are and I'll happily take you there.

lines.speaker: Veos
lines.text: I'm afraid access to Great Kourend is currently prohibited.

lines.speaker: Veos
lines.text: You cannot pass as you haven't unlocked access to the Great Kourend and Kebos Lowlands area in this League.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Goodbye.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Hello Veos.

lines.speaker: Veos
lines.text: Hello there. What can I do for you?

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Can you take me somewhere?

lines.speaker: Veos
lines.text: I'm afraid that you're not eligible to travel to Great Kourend at the moment. Come back when you are and I'll happily take you there.

lines.speaker: Veos
lines.text: Where would you like to go?

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: I'd like to travel to Port Piscarilius, please.

lines.speaker: Veos
lines.text: As you wish, I hope you don't get seasick, it is a long voyage.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: I'd like to travel to Land's End, please.

lines.speaker: Veos
lines.text: As you wish, I hope you don't get seasick, it is a long voyage.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Actually I'd like to stay here.

lines.speaker: Veos
lines.text: As you wish.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Nothing.

lines.speaker: Veos
lines.text: Hello again, Azacor! What can I do for you?

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Where am I exactly?

lines.speaker: Veos
lines.text: This is the port of Piscarilius. Home to Kourend's finest fisherman, but beware of the thieves!

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Can you tell me about the other parts of Kourend?

lines.speaker: Veos
lines.text: Certainly. To the west is the city of Arceuus, where they study magic at Kourend's Grand Library.

lines.speaker: Veos
lines.text: Further west is Lovakengj, where you'll find our best miners and smithers working to arm the Shayzien soldiers to the south west.

lines.speaker: Veos
lines.text: Finally, to the south you'll find Hosidius. They focus on agriculture to provide food for all of Great Kourend.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Thanks.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Can you take me somewhere?

lines.speaker: Veos
lines.text: Where would you like to go?

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: I'd like to travel to Port Sarim, please.

lines.speaker: Veos
lines.text: As you wish, I hope you don't get seasick, it is a long voyage.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Could you tell me more about Kourend?

lines.speaker: Veos
lines.text: Certainly. The Kingdom of Great Kourend is made up of five main cities. They are the cities of Arceuus, Lovakengj, Shayzien, Piscarilius and Hosidius. Each city is ruled by one of the five houses of Kourend.

lines.speaker: Veos
lines.text: At one time, the kingdom as a whole was ruled over by a king or queen that the five houses answered to.

lines.speaker: Veos
lines.text: However, since our last King died 20 years ago, the kingdom has instead been ruled by the Kourend Council.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Goodbye.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: I've lost something you've given me.

lines.speaker: Veos
lines.text: But I haven't given you anything recently.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Yes you did. You gave me a reward for helping your client.

lines.speaker: Veos
lines.text: Client? I don't...

lines.speaker: Veos
lines.text: Ah I remember now. Apologies friend, my mind isn't what it once was.

lines.speaker: Veos
lines.text: I do remember rewarding you. I'm afraid I don't have anything else for you though.

lines.speaker: Veos
lines.text: I do have some things for you. Enjoy!

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Nothing, thanks.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: What's this old book you gave me?

lines.speaker: Veos
lines.text: Ah that. I bought it at an auction a while back. Apparently, it belonged to the daughter of King Kharedst IV, the final king of Great Kourend.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Why did you give it to me?

lines.speaker: Veos
lines.text: I'd hoped it might have some interesting information in it. Most of the pages are missing though so I have no use for it. I thought you might be able to find something to do with it.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Fair enough. Thanks!

lines.speaker: Veos
lines.text: These remind me of a pet I once had. Please... put them away.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Sorry, Veos. I didn't know.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Would you feel comfortable sharing your story?

lines.speaker: Veos
lines.text: I once had a wolf, [player name]. His name was Copper. He was loyal. Brave... Gentle. He'd wear this beautiful crimson red collar.

lines.speaker: Veos
lines.text: One day, I was travelling on the mainland, nearby a tribe of Fremenniks. Not exactly a spring chicken at this point, my own wolf was pushing 19...

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: 19 years old? That's an incredible amount of time for a wolf to live!

lines.speaker: Veos
lines.text: Indeed. Sadly, a group of feral foxes ambushed us. I fought back, along with Copper, though he took wounds that even a young wolf would struggle dealing with.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: What did you do?

lines.speaker: Veos
lines.text: I ran, [player name]... Like a coward.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Did you ever find him?

lines.speaker: Veos
lines.text: I did not... I searched for days, but I was unable to find even his collar.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: I can help! I'll search for Copper's collar. I'm sure I can find the fox that has it...

lines.speaker: Veos
lines.text: Truly? You'd do that for me? Thank you so much, [player name]. I can't thank you enough! My heart's been filled with regret ever since it happened... and I think having a small part of Copper back, would make me complete again.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: I'll return when I have found Copper's collar. Take care!

sections.title: Using Wolf bones on Veos before returning the collar

lines.speaker: Veos
lines.text: How goes the hunt for Copper's collar, [player name]?

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: I haven't had any luck finding it yet, Veos. Where would you recommend searching?

lines.speaker: Veos
lines.text: I'd imagine the fox which killed Copper will likely still have the collar in their possession. They were nearby a Fremennik town.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Thanks, Veos. I'll return when I have the collar!

sections.title: Using Copper's crimson collar on Veos

lines.speaker: Veos
lines.text: How goes the hunt for Copper's collar, [player name]?

lines.speaker: Veos
lines.text: [Player name]... I can't thank you enough. I don't have a reward, but know that to me, this means so much. Perhaps in the future, I can repay you.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: You're more than welcome Veos, and don't worry about a reward. Losing your best friend is always hard. Hopefully that item will bring you some comfort. Take care!

sections.title: Using Wolf bones on Veos after returning the collar

lines.speaker: Veos
lines.text: [Player name]... I can't thank you enough for what you've done for me. I don't have a reward, but know that to me, this means so much. Perhaps in the future I can repay you.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: You're more than welcome Veos, and don't worry about a reward. Losing your best friend is always hard. Hopefully that item will bring you some comfort. Take care!

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Hello, who are you?

lines.speaker: Veos
lines.text: I am Veos and I've just arrived in Port Sarim from a distant land.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Where are you from?

lines.speaker: Veos
lines.text: I am from the magnificent kingdom of Great Kourend on the continent of Zeah, to the far west.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: That's great, can you take me there please?

lines.speaker: Veos
lines.text: Certainly! I hope you don't get seasick, it is a long voyage.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Tell me more about Great Kourend.

lines.speaker: Veos
lines.text: Great Kourend is a magnificent kingdom comprising of five districts called Houses. The houses are ruled by the Lords of Arceuus, Lovakengj, Shayzien, Piscarilius and Hosidius.

lines.speaker: Veos
lines.text: Since our last King died 20 years ago the kingdom has been ruled by an elected council.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Tell me more about Zeah.

lines.speaker: Veos
lines.text: Zeah is a huge continent far to the west of here full of new adventures and hidden treasures. Sadly, the kingdom of Great Kourend is besieged by lizard creatures and it is not possible to get out of the kingdom just yet.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Good bye.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Who're you? I've never seen you around these parts before.

lines.speaker: Veos
lines.text: I am Veos. Port master and scout for an elite Triumvirate.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Triumvirate?

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Who? Where? Why have you suddenly docked here?

lines.speaker: Veos
lines.text: These are questions to which you shall not find answers, adventurer.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Then why are you here?

lines.speaker: Veos
lines.text: There are secrets in this world for which you are not ready.

lines.speaker: Veos
lines.text: Yo.... we, are not alone.
